overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street with Japanese-inspired architecture. The character navigates past ramen shops, cafes, and police vehicles under a dense network of concrete overpasses while pedestrians and futuristic cars populate the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street with Japanese ramen shops

agents.ego_description: character in purple top and jeans walking steadily along the sidewalk past food stalls

notable_agents.action: standing near the building entrance looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: circular green neon sign with cat-like logo above a food stall
traditional Japanese red paper lanterns hanging from the building facade
white building wall with large red Japanese kanji characters painted vertically
metal barrel with flames burning inside providing warmth

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk past a ramen shop marked by a distinctive green circular sign and red paper lanterns. A burning barrel sits on the right side near an NPC standing by the building entrance, while Japanese signage adorns the white building walls ahead.

events.description: passing from ramen shop area into covered overpass corridor with Kutsugi Cafe

agents.ego_description: continuing straight under the massive concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street under the overpass

entered.detail: vertical sign with 'KUTSUGI CAFE' in yellow and red letters
green neon sign reading 'OPEN' in the cafe window
large floating digital advertisements attached to the overpass structure
yellow metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass past the Kutsugi Cafe with its green neon open sign. Futuristic cars drive by on the left while holographic billboards adorn the overhead structure, and yellow barricades line the edge of the sidewalk.

events.description: character turns right at intersection and crosses the street
orange van drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and crossing the street toward the Coral building

notable_agents.action: orange van driving through the intersection
person in yellow jacket walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: green building facade with 'Coral' signage and steam vents
large red neon sign shaped like lips
paved crosswalk with red and white curbs at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at an intersection, crossing the street past the green Coral building with steam vents and various neon signs including a prominent red lips sign. An orange van drives through the intersection while pedestrians in colorful clothing walk along the sidewalks.

events.description: passing black police SUV parked beside red and white construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking past the police vehicle and construction area under the overpass

notable_agents.action: black police SUV with NCPD markings parked beside construction barriers

entered.detail: black armored SUV with police markings and red lights
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off the construction zone
green electrical utility boxes behind the barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking past a black police SUV parked beside red-and-white construction barriers under the concrete overpass. Steam rises from vents in the street as the character navigates the narrow walkway between the construction zone and the building facades.

events.description: emerging from shadow of overpass into brighter direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant skyscrapers in the open street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away in the distance toward the city center

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers visible at the end of the street
large vertical pink digital advertisement screen on the building
scattered construction materials and broken concrete on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the character emerges from the overpass shadow into brighter sunlight, walking toward distant skyscrapers. Large digital billboards line the right side while construction debris litters the left sidewalk, and the path leads deeper into the dense urban core.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a narrow covered sidewalk into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by tracking the character past a ramen shop adorned with red paper lanterns and a burning barrel, moving alongside white walls covered in Japanese signage. As the path leads under a massive concrete overpass, the environment shifts toward a more industrial scale, passing the green neon glow of the Kutsugi Cafe while holographic billboards flicker overhead and futuristic cars stream by. The scene then opens up as the character turns right at an intersection, crossing the street past the steam vents of the green Coral building and a prominent red lips sign. Finally, the camera captures the chaotic energy of the city center, moving past an orange van and pedestrians in colorful clothing under the glare of various neon displays.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into the bright, expansive light of a futuristic urban center. It begins by navigating a narrow walkway past a black police SUV and red-and-white construction barriers, where steam rises from street vents against a backdrop of building facades. As the character moves forward, the oppressive shadow of the overpass recedes and the environment opens up into brilliant sunlight. The scene then expands to reveal a vista of distant skyscrapers and large digital billboards lining the right side, while construction debris remains scattered along the left sidewalk. The camera finally pushes deeper into the dense urban core, transitioning from the industrial gloom of the underpass to the vivid scale of the city.
